item.title: Neighbor Heard Screaming From the Woods & Then She Vanished: Where is Suzanne Simpson?

media:content.media:title: Neighbor Heard Screaming From the Woods & Then She Vanished: Where is Suzanne Simpson?

item.title: Noura Jackson: Guilty Or Innocent?
item.description: Noura Jackson was just 18 years old when her mother was found stabbed to death inside their home in Memphis in 2005. Prosecutors claimed Noura was responsible, pointing to alleged evidence and inconsistencies in her story. But supporters argue the case was built on questionable testimony, missing evidence, and investigative errors. With years of legal battles and a conviction later overturned, the question still divides opinion: was Noura Jackson truly guilty, or wrongfully accused?

media:content.media:title: Noura Jackson: Guilty Or Innocent?
media:content.media:description: Noura Jackson was just 18 years old when her mother was found stabbed to death inside their home in Memphis in 2005. Prosecutors claimed Noura was responsible, pointing to alleged evidence and inconsistencies in her story. But supporters argue the case was built on questionable testimony, missing evidence, and investigative errors. With years of legal battles and a conviction later overturned, the question still divides opinion: was Noura Jackson truly guilty, or wrongfully accused?

item.title: Madison Schemitz's Inspiring Journey Back to Health After Surviving an Attack By Her Ex
item.description: Madison Schemitz, 17, was stabbed outside a Ponte Vedra Beach, Florida restaurant in June 2023 by her ex-boyfriend Spencer Pearson, leaving her temporarily paralyzed. Her mother and a bystander were also injured intervening. Pearson pleaded guilty and was sentenced to life in prison in November 2024. Schemitz has since become an advocate for teen dating violence awareness.

media:content.media:title: Madison Schemitz's Inspiring Journey Back to Health After Surviving an Attack By Her Ex
media:content.media:description: Madison Schemitz, 17, was stabbed outside a Ponte Vedra Beach, Florida restaurant in June 2023 by her ex-boyfriend Spencer Pearson, leaving her temporarily paralyzed. Her mother and a bystander were also injured intervening. Pearson pleaded guilty and was sentenced to life in prison in November 2024. Schemitz has since become an advocate for teen dating violence awareness.

item.title: Grad Student Found Dead in Illinois River | The Mysterious Death of Jelani Day
item.description: Jelani Day vanished in 2021 after leaving campus in Bloomington. Days later, his car was discovered in a wooded area, and weeks after that, his body was found in the Illinois River. The circumstances surrounding his disappearance and death raised serious questions among his family and the public, especially as they pushed for answers about how the investigation was handled. With many details still unclear, the case continues to leave people asking what really happened to Jelani Day.

media:content.media:title: Grad Student Found Dead in Illinois River | The Mysterious Death of Jelani Day
media:content.media:description: Jelani Day vanished in 2021 after leaving campus in Bloomington. Days later, his car was discovered in a wooded area, and weeks after that, his body was found in the Illinois River. The circumstances surrounding his disappearance and death raised serious questions among his family and the public, especially as they pushed for answers about how the investigation was handled. With many details still unclear, the case continues to leave people asking what really happened to Jelani Day.
